title: Maps tree nodes to context-menu actions with kind-specific logic
purpose: Provides a pure function that returns context menu actions for a given tree node based on its kind and properties.
module_context: Defines types for TreeNode kinds and artifact types, and exports the getActionsForNode function that maps nodes to their context-menu actions.

steps.content: Evaluate the kind of the input node.
IF the node is an artifact, check its artifact type and return corresponding actions.
IF the artifact type is image, return actions specific to image artifacts.
ELSE return actions for non-image artifacts.
IF the node is a blueprint, return deprecation actions.
IF the node is an embed, return rename and delete actions.
IF the node is a code-file, return file browser and sync actions.
IF the node is a task-graph or task-details, return an empty action list.
IF the node is a todo, return edit, completion, and delete actions.
IF the node kind does not match any case, return an empty action list.
